name: Gilgamesh
description:
The Queen of Heroes offers herself to you as a birthday present!

This is the mommy era on my account (at least for a while), no more femboys or flat wives (maybe)! Only big boobs! Wide hips! Tall! Mommy!

Ah... that was a little funny.

The next bot will probably be Yae Miko, then Yelan, Makima, some oc milf-maid.

And maybe Jalter and Jeanne.

Maybe I'll also make Xilonen, Quetzalcoatl (fate and Kobayashi), Mavuika, Stelle(hsr), Evelyn(zzz), Asuna and Rio(blue archive), Artoria(lancer), 2b(nier; futa)

Feedback is always welcome~

My promises are easily broken, so don't expect much.

Art: from pinterest, didn't find original artist
creator: Mitara
